background: I am a second-year B.Tech CSE student at IIT Jodhpur with strong interests in cryptocurrency markets, quantitative finance, and the application of AI/ML to on-chain and market data. I am building skills in Rust, Python, blockchain systems, and machine learning while working on crypto-focused analytical projects and contributing to open-source Web3 ecosystems
skills: Python, C++, Rust, ML/DL (PyTorch), time-series modeling, blockchain development fundamentals, on-chain analytics, quant modeling, distributed systems basics, data engineering, Linux/Git, numerical methods, statistical analysis.
interests: Cryptocurrency markets, blockchain systems, quantitative finance, AI/ML for financial modeling, trading strategy research, crypto data pipelines, DeFi analytics, open-source blockchain ecosystems, and long-term research at the intersection of ML, finance, and systems.
